meta.title: How to transition into a career in ML/AI
meta.description:
Event Agenda:
- 20 mins: Event kickoff + Presentation by Sadie St.Lawrence (https://www.linkedin.com/in/sadiestlawrence/)
- 40 mins:  Q&A on Discourse 

How to participate in Q&A:
- Join our community on Discourse to post questions to our speakers and discuss with others.
- After logging in, go to the career category (https://community.deeplearning.ai/c/random-discussions/careers/how-to-transition-into-a-ml-ai-career/238) and post your questions or upvote others. 
- If you are new to Discourse, click here (https://community.deeplearning.ai/invites/qGd2yfxaVp ) to sign up first
- To participate, simply ask a question by creating a topic, upvote others', or reply to posts!

This event is designed for two audience groups looking to explore a career pivot into machine learning or AI:
Those with a non-technical background.
And those who are currently studying or working in data science or software engineering.

To sign up for our future events, subscribe to our newsletter: https://www.deeplearning.ai/events/

Special thanks to FourthBrain for co-hosting the event with us!
About FourthBrain: https://www.fourthbrain.ai/
